title: citrus × nobilis subf. rokugatsu
intro: Citrus × nobilis subf. rokugatsu is a hybrid citrus plant, known as a yuzu or yukou, that is a cross between a mandarin and a grapefruit. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, due to its high content of vitamin C and limonene. The health benefits of consuming citrus × nobilis subf. rokugatsu include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage and disease. The plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
